mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_pending_approval (approval_id, run_id, request_id, conversation_id, resolved_workspace, workspace_display_name, tool, input_json, permission_level, risk_reason, operation_preview, diff_json, policy_fingerprint, metadata_json, context_json, created_at, expires_at, consumed) VALUES (#{approvalId}, #{runId}, #{requestId}, #{conversationId}, #{resolvedWorkspace}, #{workspaceDisplayName}, #{tool}, #{inputJson}, #{permissionLevel}, #{riskReason}, #{operationPreview}, #{diffJson}, #{policyFingerprint}, #{metadataJson}, #{contextJson}, #{createdAt}, #{expiresAt}, #{consumed}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE run_id = VALUES(run_id), request_id = VALUES(request_id), conversation_id = VALUES(conversation_id), resolved_workspace = VALUES(resolved_workspace), workspace_display_name = VALUES(workspace_display_name), tool = VALUES(tool), input_json = VALUES(input_json), permission_level = VALUES(permission_level), risk_reason = VALUES(risk_reason), operation_preview = VALUES(operation_preview), diff_json = VALUES(diff_json), policy_fingerprint = VALUES(policy_fingerprint), metadata_json = VALUES(metadata_json), context_json = VALUES(context_json), created_at = VALUES(created_at), expires_at = VALUES(expires_at), consumed = VALUES(consumed), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent_pending_approval WHERE approval_id = #{approvalId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_pending_approval SET consumed = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE approval_id = #{approvalId}
